assistants.text: I will reconstruct the strongest source-visible AP_corr predicate from the packet, then test the Cycle111 block/prefix/affine-involution mechanisms against admissibility, charges, and the literal q-ledger.
The archive checks out, but the key issue is that no frozen official AP_corr predicate is yet identified; I‚Äôm separating source-visible conditions from later spectral substitutes.
The split is now concrete: the structural core admits the same-field interval packet and breaks the q_line budget, while interpolation-Fourier rejection lacks source or charge authorization.

ROUTE_CUT / BANKABLE_LEMMA / EXACT_NEW_WALL
1. Executive verdict and confidence

Verdict: the supplied packet does not support any of the three official terminal returns.

The strongest frozen AP_corr definition in the packet is none. The strongest reconstructible substitute is a structural checklist‚ÄĒintrinsic denominator, full t=1 action rank, subgroup/subfield nonconfinement, and absence of certain explicit degeneracies. The Cycle111 interval/prefix construction passes that checklist but violates the required local limit and the q
line
	‚Äč

/2
128
 bound.

Conversely, an exact, noncircular interpolation-Fourier predicate rejects every dangerous Cycle111 packet and proves the desired local-limit estimate. But the packet contains no official source theorem implying that predicate, and no official charge theorem converting its failure into a paid class.

Thus the exact result is:

L-CYCLE112-STRUCTURAL-APCORR-INSUFFICIENCY-AND-SOURCE-NONIDENTIFIABILITY.

Confidence: high for the route cut and Fourier lemma; unknown for official admissibility because the required official predicate is absent.

This absence is explicit in the packet:

m1_cycle111_low_t1_occupancy_upper_returns_audit.md, lines 105‚Äď114, forbids banking SOURCE_VALID_LOW_T1_COUNTERPACKET because AP_corr and the affine/periodic/normalization branches are not frozen.

Role 04, lines 1280‚Äď1282, says its construction passes the structural scaffold but cannot receive the official terminal.

Role 06, lines 1478‚Äď1484, treats an evaluated frozen AP_corr predicate as a required external receipt.

Role 07, lines 1818‚Äď1822, likewise terminates at APCORR_NOT_FROZEN.

3. Packet-by-packet admissibility and charge audit
Packet mechanism	Exact conclusion
Interval/symmetric-prefix packet	Passes the explicit structural core, corrected reserve, prime-field, action-rank, contained, simple-root, same-slope, fixed-normalization, and bounded-coset tests. It robustly survives deletion of one endpoint color. It fails every absolute (AP-spec) bound. Official affine-color, short-prefix, support-periodic, or additive-energy treatment is undefined.
Disjoint planted block packet	Passes the explicit structural core. It has a natural source-visible block-matching certificate, but no official charge authorization. Its prefix Fourier mass is necessarily large.
Affine-involution packet	Has an explicit involution x‚Ü¶‚ąíx and additive support structure. A natural affine/periodic charge may reject it, but the official predicate and cap are absent, so neither acceptance nor exact payment is established.

An official replay now needs the following missing artifacts.

The literal source definition of AP_corr, including constants, quantifiers, permitted source-visible rational functions, field embeddings, and whether the predicate can reject an entire datum.

Package integrity: the top-level SHA256SUMS.txt verifies all 37 included artifacts. The nested context/cycle111_clean_returns/SHA256SUMS.txt verifies the 11 included items but references 48 omitted raw artifacts, so a full nested replay requires those files or a reduced checksum manifest.

6. Next exact lemma or construction
EXACT_NEW_WALL
L-CYCLE112-OFFICIAL-APCORR-DESCENT-OR-INTERVAL-COUNTERPACKET.

For every official intrinsic LOW t=1 datum, prove

AP_corr_official
  =>
  [ sum_{lambda != 0} |hat nu_w(lambda)|
      <= A * binom(n,k+sigma) ]

or provide an official charge certificate C_j with exact charged color set,
exact cap A_j, and exact allocated ledger.

The constant A and every charge cap must satisfy the combined integer ledger
2^128 * (ceil(main term) + size(union of charged sets)) <= q_line.

If this implication fails, the exact counterpacket task is to replay the Cycle111 interval family and certify:

AP_corr_official = true;
AFFINE_COLOR_ABSENT_OR_PAID;
SUPPORT_PERIODIC_ABSENT_OR_PAID;
TANGENT_ABSENT_OR_PAID;
ENDPOINT_PAID;
NORMALIZATION_RETAINED_INJECTIVE;
all other t=1 charges absent;
|Z_free| > floor(q_line/2^128).

A likely second construction, should the official predicate reject literal intervals, is the Prouhet-trade cube suggested in Role 03: tensor disjoint equal-prefix local trades while choosing multiplicatively dissociated product ratios. That tests whether the source predicate detects genuine prefix-trade rank rather than merely affine progressions.

AUDIT ‚ÄĒ Mandatory self-audit

1. Exact implication proved and not proved.
Proved the exact interpolation support identity, Fourier local-limit implication, converse Fourier witness, insufficiency of the reconstructed structural AP_corr core, and the block-matching cap. Did not prove that official AP_corr equals or implies the Fourier predicate, and did not prove official acceptance or rejection of any Cycle111 packet.

2. Relevance level.
The Fourier lemma and structural insufficiency theorem are source-route-relevant mathematical results. The block-matching cap is a q-ledger/source-checker lemma. This is not an official prize proof and not an official source-valid counterpacket.

3. First possible failure line.
The first unavailable line is evaluation of

AP
corr
official
	‚Äč

(d).

After substituting the structural scaffold, the first false line is

structural nonconfinement‚üĻprefix Fourier flatness.

The interval packet refutes it.

5. Possible numerator reductions.
Residue quotient and hidden action rank are vacuous at t=1. Contained/delete-one is absent by degree. Same-slope collisions are deduplicated. Prime fields remove proper-subfield confinement. Simple locator roots address the literal tangent mechanism. Endpoint deletion is paid in the interval family. Affine-color, broader tangent, support-periodic, retained-normalization, and source-level rejection can still reduce or eliminate the numerator because their official predicates are missing.

6. Conversion to PROOF or COUNTERPACKET.
This is not merely a PLAN. Conversion to T1_APCORR_LOCAL_LIMIT requires the official implication (8). Conversion to SOURCE_VALID_LOW_T1_COUNTERPACKET requires a literal official AP_corr=true receipt and exact negative or paid certificates for every remaining charge on the interval or Prouhet-trade construction.

cycle112_source_apcorr_t1_block_packet_9pro_packet.zip
Zip Archive
# Common Prompt For Cycle112

You are one of nine independent theorem workers attacking the RS-MCA Proximity
Prize route. You have a packet of local files attached. Work only from those
files and your internal mathematical knowledge.

NO INTERNET. Do not browse, search, cite new web sources, or rely on live
external sources. Use MAX reasoning. Try to fully solve the problem. If you
cannot fully solve it, progress it as much as possible by producing the
strongest exact lemma, source-valid counterpacket, charge theorem, checker, or
route cut you can.

Cycle111 already cut the literal pure main-term LOW t=1 occupancy theorem.
Do not spend your answer re-proving that the unqualified statement is false.
Use the Cycle111 audit and clean returns as inputs, not authorities, and decide
the next exact wall.

Primary target:


text
L-CYCLE112-SOURCE-APCORR-T1-BLOCK-PACKET-ADMISSIBILITY-OR-CHARGE.

Given an intrinsic LOW t=1 datum and a Cycle111 block/prefix/affine-involution
packet, return exactly one:

1. SOURCE_VALID_LOW_T1_COUNTERPACKET:
   source AP_corr true, prize-strength corrected reserve true, all endpoint,
   field, affine-color, tangent, contained/delete-one, periodic/quotient,
   same-slope, retained-normalization, and hidden-action-rank charges absent or
   exactly paid, and free K_line colors > floor(q_line/2^128);

2. T1_BLOCK_PACKET_CHARGED:
   an explicit official source-visible charge class for the packet, an exact
   cap A0, and an integer ledger 2^128*A0 <= allocated q_line reserve;

3. T1_APCORR_LOCAL_LIMIT:
   a noncircular theorem proving that frozen official AP_corr implies the
   needed restricted-sum / prefix-fiber / Fourier local-limit cap after charged
   packets are removed.


You must treat q-ledger usage literally:


text
q_line = final color/security denominator.
q_gen  = entropy denominator only when a source theorem proves the loss.
q_code = code field size, not a free denominator.
q_chal = unused unless a protocol transfer theorem is proved; do not use it.
Target closure is 2^128 * N_free <= q_line after charges.


Use these labels exactly:


text
PROOF
COUNTERPACKET
BANKABLE_LEMMA
ROUTE_CUT
EXACT_NEW_WALL
AUDIT
PLAN


Do not overclaim. Distinguish:

- official prize theorem,
- source-valid route theorem,
- q-ledger transfer theorem,
- finite/model certificate,
- checker plan,
- heuristic or analogy.

Required output structure:

1. Executive verdict and confidence.
2. Exact theorem, counterpacket, charge theorem, route cut, or checker statement.
3. Detailed proof, construction, charge audit, or obstruction.
4. Verification requirements or replay requirements.
5. Next exact lemma or construction.

---

# Mandatory Self-Audit Addendum
